title: epitrachys lappacea
intro: Epitrachys lappacea, also known as the "Hawaiian hibiscus," is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and inflammation. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing the risk of chronic diseases and improving cardiovascular health. Epitrachys lappacea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in some skincare products due to its purported benefits for the skin.
